## Description
A clear description of what the bug is.

## Command run
```
narchsafe [flags]
```

## Expected behaviour

## Actual behaviour
Include the full terminal output.

# paste relevant lines from /var/log/narchsafe.log

## Environment
- narchsafe version: <!-- narchsafe --version -->
- Arch Linux kernel: <!-- uname -r -->
- systemd version:   <!-- systemctl --version | head -1 -->
- Filesystem (/, /boot): <!-- e.g. ext4, btrfs, zfs -->
- OOM/snapshot options used:
